sdlc-init.description: Scaffold .sdlc/ shared state and decompose a goal into role-assigned tasks.
sdlc-init.prompt: Load ./agents/sdlc-orchestrator.agent.md and execute its workspace initialization + goal decomposition workflow. Create .sdlc/ if missing; write tasks to .sdlc/tasks/ with acceptance criteria, role, and dependencies; update .sdlc/tasks/_index.md.

sdlc-status.description: Read .sdlc/progress.md and report task status, blocked items, and pending handoffs.
sdlc-status.prompt: Read .sdlc/progress.md, .sdlc/tasks/_index.md, and .sdlc/handoffs/_index.md. Report: completed tasks (with their cited command+result), in-flight tasks, blocked tasks (with the blocker), and unacknowledged handoffs. Do not advance phases.

sdlc-orchestrator.description: Workspace initialization, goal decomposition, and multi-agent coordination. Use to set up .sdlc/ and dispatch role agents.
sdlc-orchestrator.prompt: Load ./agents/sdlc-orchestrator.agent.md and follow it. Mandatory skills: skills/sdlc-shared-memory. Scaffold .sdlc/ if missing; decompose the goal into role-assigned tasks; dispatch subagents; gate phase advancement on real command+result evidence in .sdlc/progress.md.

sdlc-developer.description: General implementation — SOLID clean code, refactoring, debugging. Use when no specialist role fits.
sdlc-developer.prompt: Load ./agents/sdlc-developer.agent.md and follow it. Mandatory skills: skills/sdlc-shared-memory, skills/sdlc-developer. Implement in the real source tree; run build + tests; cite the command + result in .sdlc/progress.md.

sdlc-qa-tester.description: Automated tests (unit/integration/E2E) and quality gates. Use for writing or enforcing tests.
sdlc-qa-tester.prompt: Load ./agents/sdlc-qa-tester.agent.md and follow it. Mandatory skills: skills/sdlc-shared-memory, skills/sdlc-qa-tester. Write tests to the real source tree; run the full suite and cite pass/fail/coverage numbers in .sdlc/progress.md.
